name: chr4p_subtelomeric_variable
description: Chromosome 4 p-arm subtelomeric region containing a mosaic of subterminal repeats, degenerate TTAGGG stretches and small SDs. Site of Wolf-Hirschhorn syndrome (4p- / 4p16.3 deletion) with variable breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: Subterminal repeat mosaic; TAR1 family elements; degenerate telomere; canonical (TTAGGG)n distal cap.
